ModMetaData.name: Vibe Playing - AI Colony Advisor
ModMetaData.author: wuxie
ModMetaData.description:
Let AI manage your colony. You decide what to do, AI figures out how.
Connect to any OpenAI-compatible LLM API to get real-time colony analysis, strategic advice, and (optionally) automated execution of plans.
Features: - Natural language strategy input - Colony state analysis and reporting - Work priority optimization suggestions - Building and zone planning - Configurable API endpoint (OpenAI, Ollama, etc.)
